title: Isolation and Characterisation of Methyl-(α-chloro-β-3, 4-methylene-dioxyphenyl)-acrylate
author: S.P. DHOUBHADEL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Tribhuvan University, Kirtipur, Kathmandu, Nepal 

  Manuscript received 5 August 1974; accepted 18 November 1974  

 A byproduct of Darzens condensation has been isolated and characterised by U.V., I.R., NMR and Mass spectrometric and analytical methods which indicate that the new compound is methyl­ce- \(a\) -chloro- \(\beta\) - 3,4-methylenedioxyphenyI)- acrylate sand that the Darzens condensation is essen­tially similar to Aldol condensation.
steps_raw:
